---
name: env
description: Environment and sandbox management for code execution
protocol:
  domain: system
  api: env
---

# Environment

Manages execution environments and sandboxes for safe code execution.

## Capabilities

- Create and manage sandboxes
- Get current sandbox state
- Environment variable access
- Sandbox lifecycle management

## When to Use

- Need to execute code in an isolated environment
- Setting up a sandbox for user code
- Managing environment state during a session
